---
title: "Async provider-agent integration"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tinytest)
library(rho.async)
library(rho.ai)
library(rho.agent)
```

```{r integration}
agent <- rho_agent(rho_faux_provider(), rho_model("faux", "faux"))
run <- rho_prompt(agent, "hello integration")
result <- rho_await(run)
expect_equal(result@messages[[2]]@content[[1]]@text, "faux: hello integration")
```
